channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.description: Time to fix the bad habit we are all guilty of

item.description: It's not what you think.

item.description: Our investigation.

item.description: Ever wonder what a brain health expert puts in their shopping cart?

item.title: Should Drug Companies Be Advertising to Consumers?
item.description: Aging means “becoming a target” of the industry, one expert said. After decades of debate, politicians of all stripes are proposing bans.

item.title: Working Towards A Healthy Weight? Ditch These “Clean” Foods ASAP
item.description: Not all health foods are created equal
